name: @sockudo/client
description: Sockudo JavaScript client full port on Bun + Oxc + Vite(Rolldown)

scripts.build: bun run clean && bun run build:web
scripts.build:all: bun run clean && bun run build:web && bun run build:node
scripts.build:web: vite build && vite build --config vite.config.filter.ts && vite build --config vite.config.with-encryption.ts
scripts.build:node: vite build --config vite.config.node.ts && vite build --config vite.config.filter.node.ts && vite build --config vite.config.worker.ts && vite build --config vite.config.worker.with-encryption.ts && vite build --config vite.config.react-native.ts
scripts.check: bun run typecheck && bun run lint && bun test
scripts.lint: oxlint --config .oxlintrc.json src test vite.config.ts vite.config.filter.ts vite.config.node.ts vite.config.filter.node.ts vite.config.with-encryption.ts vite.config.worker.ts vite.config.worker.with-encryption.ts vite.config.react-native.ts
scripts.lint:fix: oxlint --config .oxlintrc.json --fix src test vite.config.ts vite.config.filter.ts vite.config.node.ts vite.config.filter.node.ts vite.config.with-encryption.ts vite.config.worker.ts vite.config.worker.with-encryption.ts vite.config.react-native.ts
scripts.format: oxfmt src test vite.config.ts vite.config.filter.ts vite.config.node.ts vite.config.filter.node.ts vite.config.with-encryption.ts vite.config.worker.ts vite.config.worker.with-encryption.ts vite.config.react-native.ts
scripts.format:check: oxfmt --check src test vite.config.ts vite.config.filter.ts vite.config.node.ts vite.config.filter.node.ts vite.config.with-encryption.ts vite.config.worker.ts vite.config.worker.with-encryption.ts vite.config.react-native.ts
